title: The SAARC Convention (Suppression of Terrorism) Act, 1993
full_text: The SAARC Convention (Suppression of Terrorism) Act, 1993 दक्षिण एशियाई क्षेत्रीय सहयोग संगठन अभिसमय (आतंकवाद दमन) अधिनियम, 1993 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 199336 Act Number: 36 Enactment Date: 1993-04-26 Act Year: 1993 Short Title: The SAARC Convention (Suppression of Terrorism) Act, 1993 Hindi Title: दक्षिण एशियाई क्षेत्रीय सहयोग संगठन अभिसमय (आतंकवाद दमन) अधिनियम, 1993 Long Title: An Act to give effect to the South Asian Association for Regional Cooperation Convention on Suppression of Terrorism and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of External Affairs Enforcement Date: 26-04-1993 Last Updated: 01-04-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The SAARC Convention (Suppression of Terrorism) Act, 1993 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and application. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Application of the Convention. Section 4. Hostage-taking. Section 5. Provisions as to Extradition Act. Section 6. Offences committed outside India. Section 7. Previous sanction necessary for prosecution. Section 8. Protection of action taken in good faith.
